capability_profile.notes: Top-down planar movement with damping; no gravity-dependent jumping.

common_failures: Do not lower minimum_acceptance_tier for simple known tasks just to pass validation.
Keep capability_profile controls honest; no teleporting or direct object mutation.
Tier 5 patterns must be physically solved by check_objective(), not just progress-verified.
generation_guidance: Reuse this objective/capability profile shape when the prompt semantics match.
Do not use validator controls outside capability_profile['allowed_controls'].
Expose progress metrics: distance_to_exit, min_distance_to_nearest_chaser, was_touched, time_remaining.

objective_profile.objective_description: Reach the exit zone in a top-down maze without being touched by any of the three angry agents.
objective_profile.success_predicate: agent enters exit_zone sensor AND has not been touched by any angry agent

source_prompt: agent has to escape 3 other angry agents in a maze and get to the exit without getting touched by angry agents
summary: Reach the exit zone in a top-down maze without being touched by any of the three angry agents. Validated as solved_verified with movement=ground_force, gravity=top_down_flat.

physics_relations.intent_summary: A controllable agent must navigate a 2D maze to reach an exit while avoiding contact with three pursuing angry agents.

agent.friction_policy: high enough for contact tasks; unrestricted thrust only in zero_g
agent.strength_policy: scale with max scene mass and gravity

relations.repair: Provide a clear reachable route and place the exit/goal sensor on the route.

critical_path_occupancy.why: avoidance is pressure, not a permanent path blocker

enemy_max_speed_relative_to_agent.why: simple route-following oracle can still prove reachability

enemy_spawn_distance_from_goal.why: avoid turning the goal sensor into a guarded blocker

relations.repair: Treat avoidance as a safety constraint paired with the reach-goal objective. Do not convert this into a standalone survival timer unless the prompt gives a duration.

repair_knobs.policy: safe numeric/layout tuning only; preserve prompt semantics
safe numeric/layout tuning only; preserve prompt semantics
safe numeric/layout tuning only; preserve prompt semantics
safe numeric/layout tuning only; preserve prompt semantics
safe numeric/layout tuning only; preserve prompt semantics

validator_strategy.parameter_policy: validate physical properties such as mass, friction, restitution, gravity, slope, clearance, and impulse before broad regeneration
validator_strategy.repair_unit: failed relation, not failed task template
validator_strategy.template_policy: helpers are optional constructors; relations are the conceptual source of truth

world_context.rationale: Planar maze/room/arena cue: use top-down flat-plane physics, not true zero-gravity freeflight, unless the prompt explicitly says zero gravity.

verification.reason: Code-level objective satisfied during subgoal validation.
